# programs.antigravity-cli

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.antigravity-cli`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.antigravity-cli.commands` | `attribute set of (open submodule of string)` | An attribute set of Gemini CLI custom commands to migrate to Antigravity CLI global skills. The name of the attribute set will be the name of each generated skill directory. |
| `programs.antigravity-cli.commands.<name>.description` | `string` | A brief, one-line description of what the command does. This text will be displayed next to your command in the /help menu. If you omit this field, a generic description will be generated from the filename. |
| `programs.antigravity-cli.commands.<name>.prompt` | `string` | The prompt that will be sent to the Gemini model when the command is executed. This can be a single-line or multi-line string. The special placeholder {{args}} will be replaced with the text the user typed after the command name. |
| `programs.antigravity-cli.context` | `attribute set of (strings concatenated with "\n" or absolute path)` | Global context(s) for Antigravity CLI. The attribute name becomes the filename, with a {file}`.md` extension added automatically. Each value is either: - Inline content as a string - A path to a file containing the content The configured files are written to {file}`~/.gemini/`. Note: You can customize which context file names Antigravity CLI looks for by setting `settings.context.fileName`. For example: `nix settings = {   context.fileName = ["AGENTS.md", "CONTEXT.md", "GEMINI.md"]; }; ` |
| `programs.antigravity-cli.defaultModel` | `null or string` | The default model to use for the CLI. Will be set as $GEMINI_MODEL when configured. |
| `programs.antigravity-cli.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Antigravity CLI. |
| `programs.antigravity-cli.enableMcpIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to integrate the MCP servers config from {option}`programs.mcp.servers` into {option}`programs.antigravity-cli.mcpServers`. Note: Any servers already present in {option}`programs.antigravity-cli.mcpServers` is not overridden by servers present under the same name in {option}`programs.mcp.servers` |
| `programs.antigravity-cli.mcpServers` | `JSON value` | MCP server configuration written to {file}`~/.gemini/config/mcp_config.json`. Remote servers use `serverUrl`; `url` and `httpUrl` are accepted for migration and converted automatically. |
| `programs.antigravity-cli.package` | `null or package` | The antigravity-cli package to use. |
| `programs.antigravity-cli.permissions` | `null or (submodule)` | Antigravity CLI fine-grained permissions written to {option}`programs.antigravity-cli.settings.permissions`. |
| `programs.antigravity-cli.permissions.allow` | `list of string` | Permissions to allow without prompting. |
| `programs.antigravity-cli.permissions.ask` | `list of string` | Permissions to ask before using. |
| `programs.antigravity-cli.permissions.deny` | `list of string` | Permissions to deny without prompting. |
| `programs.antigravity-cli.policies` | `attribute set of (absolute path or TOML value)` | An attribute set of Gemini CLI policy definitions to create in {file}`~/.gemini/policies/` when {option}`programs.antigravity-cli.package` is a `gemini-cli` package. Antigravity CLI configures permissions in {option}`programs.antigravity-cli.settings.permissions` or {option}`programs.antigravity-cli.permissions`. |
| `programs.antigravity-cli.settings` | `JSON value` | Configuration written to {file}`~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/settings.json`. |
| `programs.antigravity-cli.skills` | `(attribute set of (strings concatenated with "\n" or absolute path)) or absolute path` | Custom skills for Antigravity CLI. This option can be either: - An attribute set defining skills - A path to a directory containing skill folders If an attribute set is used, the attribute name becomes the skill directory name, and the value is either: - Inline content as a string (creates `~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/skills/<name>/SKILL.md`) - A path to a file (creates `~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/skills/<name>/SKILL.md`) - A path to a directory (symlinks `~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/skills/<name>/` to that directory) If a path is used, it is expected to contain one folder per skill name, each containing a {file}`SKILL.md`. The directory is symlinked to {file}`~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/skills/`. |
| `programs.antigravity-cli.useLegacyGeminiConfig` | `boolean` | Whether to write configuration to the legacy Gemini CLI locations. This is enabled automatically when {option}`programs.antigravity-cli.package` is a `gemini-cli` package. |
